name: Partition Labels
description: You are given a string s. We want to partition the string into as many parts as possible so that each letter appears in at most one part. Return a list of integers representing the size of these parts. Greedy: track the last occurrence of each character, then expand the current partition until you reach the last occurrence of all characters seen so far.
constraints: 1 <= s.length <= 500. s consists of lowercase English letters.
